code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut tokens_concat = ""
mut lengths: List<Int> = []
mut counts: List<Int> = []
mut offsets: List<Int> = []
mut total_len = 0

mut cur = ""
mut cur_len = 0

mut i = 0
while i < n
  let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  mut b = -1
  match bopt
  when Some(v)
    b = v
  when None
    b = -1
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if cur_len > 0
      mut found_idx = -1
      let num = lengths.len()
      mut k = 0
      while k < num
        if found_idx < 0
          mut o = 0
          mut l = 0
          let oo = offsets.get(k)
          match oo
          when Some(v)
            o = v
          when None
            o = 0
          end
          let ll = lengths.get(k)
          match ll
          when Some(v)
            l = v
          when None
            l = 0
          end
          if l == cur_len
            let stored = string.substring(tokens_concat, o, o + l)
            if stored == cur
              found_idx = k
            end
          end
        end
        k = k + 1
      end
      if found_idx < 0
        offsets = list.push(offsets, total_len)
        lengths = list.push(lengths, cur_len)
        counts = list.push(counts, 1)
        tokens_concat = "#{tokens_concat}#{cur}"
        total_len = total_len + cur_len
      else
        mut new_counts: List<Int> = []
        mut j = 0
        let num2 = counts.len()
        while j < num2
          let cv = counts.get(j)
          mut c = 0
          match cv
          when Some(v)
            c = v
          when None
            c = 0
          end
          if j == found_idx
            new_counts = list.push(new_counts, c + 1)
          else
            new_counts = list.push(new_counts, c)
          end
          j = j + 1
        end
        counts = new_counts
      end
      cur = ""
      cur_len = 0
    end
  else
    if b >= 0
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      cur_len = cur_len + 1
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if cur_len > 0
  mut found_idx = -1
  let num = lengths.len()
  mut k = 0
  while k < num
    if found_idx < 0
      mut o = 0
      mut l = 0
      let oo = offsets.get(k)
      match oo
      when Some(v)
        o = v
      when None
        o = 0
      end
      let ll = lengths.get(k)
      match ll
      when Some(v)
        l = v
      when None
        l = 0
      end
      if l == cur_len
        let stored = string.substring(tokens_concat, o, o + l)
        if stored == cur
          found_idx = k
        end
      end
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  if found_idx < 0
    offsets = list.push(offsets, total_len)
    lengths = list.push(lengths, cur_len)
    counts = list.push(counts, 1)
    tokens_concat = "#{tokens_concat}#{cur}"
    total_len = total_len + cur_len
  else
    mut new_counts: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    let num2 = counts.len()
    while j < num2
      let cv = counts.get(j)
      mut c = 0
      match cv
      when Some(v)
        c = v
      when None
        c = 0
      end
      if j == found_idx
        new_counts = list.push(new_counts, c + 1)
      else
        new_counts = list.push(new_counts, c)
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    counts = new_counts
  end
end

mut best_idx = -1
mut best_count = 0
mut k2 = 0
let total = counts.len()
while k2 < total
  let cv = counts.get(k2)
  mut c = 0
  match cv
  when Some(v)
    c = v
  when None
    c = 0
  end
  if c > best_count
    best_count = c
    best_idx = k2
  end
  k2 = k2 + 1
end

if best_idx >= 0
  mut o = 0
  mut l = 0
  let oo = offsets.get(best_idx)
  match oo
  when Some(v)
    o = v
  when None
    o = 0
  end
  let ll = lengths.get(best_idx)
  match ll
  when Some(v)
    l = v
  when None
    l = 0
  end
  let tok = string.substring(tokens_concat, o, o + l)
  println("top=#{tok}=#{best_count}")
end
